vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The Swiss Alps offer a picturesque landscape that seems almost too perfect to be real.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất/gián đoạn
vocab.example: Our hotel balcony provided an uninterrupted view of the sunset over the Santorini caldera.

vocab.meaning: vẻ tráng lệ siêu phàm/vĩ đại
vocab.example: There is a certain sublime majesty to the Grand Canyon that leaves you feeling incredibly small.

vocab.meaning: cây cối xanh tươi mỡ màng
vocab.example: The island was covered in verdant greenery, creating a stark contrast with the deep blue of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: địa hình gồ ghề/hiểm trở (mang vẻ đẹp hoang dã)
vocab.example: I was captivated by the rugged terrain of the Scottish Highlands during our road trip.
The dramatic cliffs of Moher are a testament to the raw power of the Atlantic Ocean.

vocab.meaning: làn nước xanh ngắt/xanh da trời
vocab.example: We spent hours gazing at the azure waters of the Adriatic Sea from the walls of Dubrovnik.

vocab.meaning: kiến trúc cổ kính, độc đáo và lôi cuốn
vocab.example: The small villages in the Cotswolds are famous for their quaint architecture and honey-colored stone.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn bao quát toàn cảnh
vocab.example: From the top of the Eiffel Tower, you are treated to a panoramic vista of the entire city of Paris.
The bioluminescent plankton gave the midnight waves an ethereal glow that was truly magical.
